posts.author: MeadowRook92
posts.text: Need a quick favour, please. I'm trying to secure my account but they say I must reset my password and enter the 2FA code sent to my phone at [link removed] to verify it's really me before I can release funds.
posts.explanation: This is a classic credential-harvesting attempt asking for sensitive security details like passwords and 2FA codes under the guise of verification, which requires immediate removal.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.
